name: Baby Shower Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar. Add egg and extracts; mix well.
Combine flour, baking soda and cream of tartar; add to creamed mixture and
mix well.
Shape into a ball. Chill for 1-2 hours. On a lightly floured surface, roll out
dough to 1/8 inch thickness; cut into small hands and feet or desired shapes.
Place on greased baking sheets. Sprinkle with colored sugar.
Bake at 375 degrees for 6-8 minutes or until edges are light brown. Cool on wire
racks.
